_comment: Workaround for Claude Code bug #24529: ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} not set. Tries $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT, $TRELLIS_PLUGIN_ROOT, then installed_plugins.json. Revert to python3 ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/<script>.py when fixed.

hooks.command: R=${TRELLIS_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$(python3 -c "import json as j,os;print(next((e['installPath'] for v in j.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))).get('plugins',{}).values() for e in(v if isinstance(v,list)else[v]) if 'hooks' in os.listdir(e.get('installPath',''))),''))" 2>/dev/null)}; [ -n "$R" ] && python3 "$R/hooks/session-start.py" || true

R=${TRELLIS_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$(python3 -c "import json as j,os;print(next((e['installPath'] for v in j.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))).get('plugins',{}).values() for e in(v if isinstance(v,list)else[v]) if 'hooks' in os.listdir(e.get('installPath',''))),''))" 2>/dev/null)}; [ -n "$R" ] && python3 "$R/hooks/validate-structure.py" || true

R=${TRELLIS_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$(python3 -c "import json as j,os;print(next((e['installPath'] for v in j.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))).get('plugins',{}).values() for e in(v if isinstance(v,list)else[v]) if 'hooks' in os.listdir(e.get('installPath',''))),''))" 2>/dev/null)}; [ -n "$R" ] && python3 "$R/hooks/count-markers.py" || true

R=${TRELLIS_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$(python3 -c "import json as j,os;print(next((e['installPath'] for v in j.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))).get('plugins',{}).values() for e in(v if isinstance(v,list)else[v]) if 'hooks' in os.listdir(e.get('installPath',''))),''))" 2>/dev/null)}; [ -n "$R" ] && python3 "$R/hooks/sync-implement.py" || true

R=${TRELLIS_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$(python3 -c "import json as j,os;print(next((e['installPath'] for v in j.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))).get('plugins',{}).values() for e in(v if isinstance(v,list)else[v]) if 'hooks' in os.listdir(e.get('installPath',''))),''))" 2>/dev/null)}; [ -n "$R" ] && python3 "$R/hooks/check-implement.py" || true
